description: 描述家乡类型的开头。small city / big town / coastal city。
examples_json: [{"en":"My hometown is a small city in southern China.","zh":"我的家乡是中国南部的一个小城市。"}]

description: 描述住所类型的标准开头。a flat / a house / a dorm。
examples_json: [{"en":"I live in a comfortable flat near the city center.","zh":"我住在市中心附近一个舒适的公寓里。"}]

description: 描述家乡特色。famous for its food / scenery / culture。
examples_json: [{"en":"It's famous for its local cuisine.","zh":"它以当地美食闻名。"}]

description: 描述学习的地点和专业。
examples_json: [{"en":"I'm studying Business Administration at Beijing University.","zh":"我在北京大学学习工商管理。"}]

description: 描述职业。a teacher / an engineer / a designer。
examples_json: [{"en":"I work as a software engineer.","zh":"我是一名软件工程师。"}]

description: 解释选择的原因。表达动机。
examples_json: [{"en":"I chose this major because I'm interested in technology.","zh":"我选择这个专业是因为我对科技感兴趣。"}]

text: In my free time I like to...
description: 描述业余爱好的标准句型。
examples_json: [{"en":"In my free time, I like to read and take photos.","zh":"空闲时我喜欢阅读和拍照。"}]

text: I got into... when I was...
description: 描述爱好如何开始。I got into photography when I was 15。
examples_json: [{"en":"I got into photography when I was 15.","zh":"我从15岁开始喜欢摄影。"}]

text: It helps me relax after a long day.
meaning: 它帮助我在一天劳累后放松。
examples_json: [{"en":"Playing the guitar helps me relax.","zh":"弹吉他能让我放松。"}]

description: 描述交通方式。take the bus / take the subway / ride a bike。
examples_json: [{"en":"I usually take the subway to work.","zh":"我通常乘地铁上班。"}]

text: The traffic in my city is...
description: 描述交通状况。crowded / convenient / terrible。
examples_json: [{"en":"The traffic in my city is quite convenient.","zh":"我所在城市的交通很便利。"}]
[{"en":"I prefer taking the subway because it's faster.","zh":"我更喜欢坐地铁因为它更快。"}]

text: The place I'd like to recommend is...
examples_json: [{"en":"The place I'd like to recommend is a small town in Yunnan.","zh":"我想推荐的地方是云南的一个小镇。"}]
[{"en":"It's located in the mountains of central Japan.","zh":"它位于日本中部的山区。"}]
[{"en":"I would recommend it because the scenery is breathtaking.","zh":"我推荐它因为那里的景色令人叹为观止。"}]

text: Tourism brings both benefits and drawbacks.
meaning: 旅游既有好处也有坏处。
examples_json: [{"en":"Tourism brings both economic benefits and environmental drawbacks.","zh":"旅游既带来经济效益也带来环境问题。"}]
[{"en":"One solution is to limit the number of daily visitors.","zh":"一个解决方案是限制每日游客数量。"}]
[{"en":"The government should invest in sustainable tourism.","zh":"政府应该投资可持续旅游。"}]

text: The person I'd like to describe is...
examples_json: [{"en":"The person I'd like to describe is my former teacher.","zh":"我想描述的人是我以前的老师。"}]
[{"en":"What impressed me most was his patience and kindness.","zh":"让我印象最深的是他的耐心和善良。"}]

description: 描述认识的时间和场合。
examples_json: [{"en":"We first met when I joined the university art club.","zh":"我们第一次见面是在我加入大学艺术社的时候。"}]

text: Technology has changed the way we...
meaning: 科技改变了我们...的方式
examples_json: [{"en":"Technology has changed the way we communicate.","zh":"科技改变了我们的沟通方式。"}]

text: On the one hand... on the other hand...
examples_json: [{"en":"On the one hand it's convenient. On the other hand it reduces face-to-face interaction.","zh":"一方面它很方便，另一方面它减少了面对面交流。"}]
[{"en":"In my opinion, social media has both positive and negative effects.","zh":"在我看来，社交媒体有正面也有负面影响。"}]

text: One of the most memorable experiences I've had was...
meaning: 我最难忘的经历之一是...
examples_json: [{"en":"One of the most memorable experiences I've had was volunteering abroad.","zh":"我最难忘的经历之一是在海外做志愿者。"}]

description: 表达从经历中获得的感悟。
examples_json: [{"en":"This experience taught me that stepping out of my comfort zone is rewarding.","zh":"这段经历让我明白走出舒适区是有回报的。"}]
[{"en":"Looking back, I feel grateful for that opportunity.","zh":"回想起来，我很感激那次机会。"}]

text: The role of education is to...
examples_json: [{"en":"The role of education is to prepare students for the real world.","zh":"教育的作用是让学生为现实世界做好准备。"}]
[{"en":"Traditional education focuses on exams and memorization.","zh":"传统教育注重考试和记忆。"}]
[{"en":"I believe that education should encourage critical thinking.","zh":"我认为教育应该鼓励批判性思维。"}]

text: The change I'd like to see is...
examples_json: [{"en":"The change I'd like to see is greater environmental awareness.","zh":"我希望看到的改变是更强的环保意识。"}]

text: If I could change one thing...
examples_json: [{"en":"If I could change one thing, it would be how we treat our planet.","zh":"如果我能改变一件事，那就是我们对待地球的方式。"}]
[{"en":"This matters because we only have one planet.","zh":"这很重要因为我们只有一个地球。"}]
[{"en":"Globalization has led to greater cultural exchange.","zh":"全球化导致了更多的文化交流。"}]
复杂对比句式。
column9: [{"en":"While globalization brings economic growth, it also risks cultural homogenization.","zh":"全球化带来经济增长的同时也有文化同质化的风险。"}]

text: It's important to strike a balance between...
examples_json: [{"en":"It's important to strike a balance between development and tradition.","zh":"在发展与传统之间取得平衡很重要。"}]
